## Minimal Reproduction

- a minimal GitHub repository
- a minimal code sample
- a failing test case

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots, stack traces, or console output.

## Additional Context

Add any other context that may help us diagnose the issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this report.
- [ ] I can reproduce this on a current supported version.
- [ ] I included a minimal reproduction.
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability report.
